---
title: "Tarek Jaziri-Arjona"
image: media/tarek.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://www.x.com/tarekjaziri/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tarekjaziriarjona
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:tarek.jaziriarjona@eui.eu
---
